cleavage agent: digested in trypsin (0.25%; Beyotime; Cat# C0201)
collision energy: The MS2 parameters were set as follows: 30% normalized collision energy
fragmentation method: the most intense precursors were subjected to higher-energy collisional dissociation fragmentation
instrument: Experiments were performed on an Orbitrap Fusion mass spectrometer
labeling: Label-free quantification (LFQ) was performed using MaxQuant
